allow: Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('Stethoscope:', typeof lr.Stethoscope\); console.log\('HardHat:', typeof lr.HardHat\); console.log\('Star:', typeof lr.Star\); console.log\('BookOpen:', typeof lr.BookOpen\);")

Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('lucide-react'\); ['Tag','Calendar','ChevronDown','Upload','X','FileText','Loader2','CheckCircle2','Send','Download','Pencil','Shield'].forEach\(n => console.log\(n+':', typeof lr[n]\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('lucide-react'\); ['Pill','Apple','Droplets','Stethoscope','HardHat'].forEach\(n => console.log\(n+':', typeof lr[n]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('lucide-react'\); const star = lr.Star; console.log\('Star typeof:', typeof star\); console.log\('Star is function?', typeof star === 'function'\); console.log\('Star name?', star && star.name\);")
Bash(node -e "const lr = require\('lucide-react'\); const star = lr.Star; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(star\)\); console.log\(Object.keys\(star || {}\)\);")
